name: PT. Tropical Agro Nusantara

history.summary: PT Tropical Agro Nusantara was founded with a simple idea: to bring the best of Indonesia's local agricultural products to a wider market while supporting the people behind them. We focus on the distribution and sales of mocaf flour (Modified Cassava Flour) and tiwul, two cassava-based products that have long been part of Indonesia's food culture.
details: Seeing the great potential of cassava as a local commodity, we work closely with farmers and small producers to ensure consistent quality and sustainable supply.
Our goal is not only to provide good products, but also to help create more opportunities for Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (UMKM) and contribute to the growth of the local economy.
Since the beginning, PT Tropical Agro Nusantara has been committed to building strong partnerships, maintaining product quality, and expanding market access.

vision: To become a trusted global supplier of high-quality cassava-based products from Indonesia.
missions: To contribute to the sustainable growth of local farmers and small enterprises through international trade.
To provide export-quality mocaf flour and tiwul that meet international standards and customer expectations.
To build long-term partnerships with global buyers through consistency, integrity, and dependable service.
To work closely with local farmers and UMKM to ensure sustainable supply and fair economic impact.
To continuously improve our quality control, production processes, and logistics to compete in the international market.

products.name: Mocaf Flour
products.description: A premium gluten-free flour made from selected cassava through a controlled fermentation process, offering fine texture and versatile functionality for bakery, noodle, snack, and other food applications.
highlights: Suitable for bakery, noodles, snacks, and composite flour applications
Bulk production capacity for export supply
Fine texture for consistent food processing

specs.label: Applications
specs.value: Bakery, noodles, snacks, and composite flour

products.name: Tiwul
products.description: A traditional Indonesian cassava-based product made from dried and processed cassava, offering a natural, gluten-free carbohydrate alternative suitable for both modern and traditional food applications.
highlights: Suitable for rehydration and food processing

specs.label: Shelf Life
specs.value: Long shelf life with proper storage

specs.label: Applications
specs.value: Rehydration, food processing, and traditional dishes

reasons.title: High-Quality Products
reasons.description: We offer carefully processed mocaf flour and tiwul that meet international standards.

reasons.title: Reliable Supply
reasons.description: Strong partnerships with local farmers and UMKM ensure consistent and sustainable supply.

reasons.title: Global Market Ready
reasons.description: Our products are packaged, tested, and delivered to meet export requirements.

reasons.title: Commitment to Communities
reasons.description: By working with local producers, we support economic growth and fair trade.
